text:
:loudspeaker: R Contribution Working Group
 :date: Thu 26 March, 15:30 - 16:30 UTC

Agenda includes:
- R Dev Day useR! 2026 & R Project Sprint 2026
- Updates on work in progress

Details: <https://contributor.r-project.org/events>
Zoom: <https://us02web.zoom.us/j/83792625860?pwd=yYHf1VHqBVxM9luqOYQ7ACIma2dlBJ.1>

elements.text:
Thu 26 March, 15:30 - 16:30 UTC

Agenda includes:
- R Dev Day useR! 2026 & R Project Sprint 2026
- Updates on work in progress

Details:

text:
Hi everyone! I'm Ashish Tiwari, a Data Science master's student at Paderborn University, Germany. I've been contributing to ggplot2/tidyverse since February, working on documentation improvements and currently collaborating with a mentor on developing a machine learning library in R.

I'm interested in getting more involved with R core, particularly around bug fixes, code contributions, and documentation/translations. My background is in Python, R, SQL, and deep learning (PyTorch), and my bachelor's thesis was on semiparametric time series modeling in R.

I'll be joining the RCWG meeting this Thursday for the first time. I also noticed that application reviewers are needed for the R Dev Day at useR! 2026 and the R Project Sprint, happy to volunteer if there's still a need.

Looking forward to connecting with the community!
